phone_presence_notes: Consistently warm and natural tone throughout — 'Boom,' 'Beautiful,' and friendly banter created a comfortable, easy conversation.
top_strength: Strong probe and estimate — correctly identified furnished-equivalent difference between 2500 and 3700 sqft home, scoped crew and cost accurately.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass completely skipped — directly reduces move time, lowers customer's bill, and protects estimate accuracy.
